title: Seed minimal Vitest spec and enforce test presence

integration_points.impact: Ensures at least one spec exists and adds/normalizes test script.
Guarantees smoke test and test script are present on disk for plan-based generations.

integration_points.snippet:
// Ensure seed tests exist on disk for plan-based generations
await seedTestsOnDisk(targetRoot);
integration_points.impact: Plan-based generations receive seeded spec before checks and metadata.

integration_points.snippet:
// Seed a minimal test and ensure test script before write
output.files = seedTestsInFiles(output.files);
integration_points.impact: Single-shot generations embed smoke spec and test script into files.
With test script ensured, sandbox uses 'npm test' consistently.

dependencies: Relies on existing vitest in devDependencies at root; generated apps may add their own devDeps via model
Installation in sandbox requires presence of a lockfile to run 'npm ci'
risks: If generated app lacks a lockfile, dependencies are not installed automatically; tests still seed but may fail until repair adds deps
Enforcing hasTests in JSON output may reject some generations; fallback is plan mode where seeding ensures presence
